arts.ttl: Nwaneri returns and Sterling dropped - Dream Arsenal line-up to face Aston Villa
arts.sum: Determined to change that record, Arsenal have recovered their form following two cup defeats last week and were dominant while still lacking clinical finishing in the box, as they won the North London Derby on Wednesday night. Dream Arsenal XI vs Aston Villa – Raya; Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Lewis-Skelly; Partey, Rice, Odegaard; Nwaneri, Havertz, Trossard

arts.ttl: Odegaard role, Ronaldo inspiration - Who is Arsenal target Sverre Nypan
arts.sum: In the latest report from The Telegraph, it is understood that Arsenal and Manchester City are currently leading the way in pursuit of Sverre Nypan, an 18-year-old central midfielder plying his trade at Rosenborg. Potentially working against Arsenal in their pursuit of Nypan is his support for rivals Manchester United .

arts.ttl: Six Arsenal players confirmed for permanent exits and seven on edge as Mikel Arteta clears decks
arts.sum: Whether it is this month or in the summer transfer window, a number of players are going to be leaving the club as Mikel Arteta looks to change his plans and overhaul his playing squad. But while they may only sign one or two players this month - if any at all - the summer is going to be a bigger priority for Arteta and an incoming sporting director to replace Edu.
